name: transfer_to_number
description: Transfer this live call to a human. Use this when: the caller has a safety emergency (brakes failed, vehicle on fire, stranded), the caller has asked to speak to a person, or the situation is too complex for the AI to handle. Before transferring, tell the caller: 'Let me connect you with someone from the team right now — please hold for just a moment.'

transfer_config.context_message: CallSaaS transfer from AI agent — caller details follow.

_notes.implementation: In ElevenLabs UI: add a System Tool of type 'Transfer to number' (or 'End call with transfer'). Set destination number to tenant on_call_phone. The system_tool_config above is a spec placeholder — exact field names depend on EL telephony setup.
_notes.availability: Requires ElevenLabs telephony integration. Not available on ConvAI web widget embeds.
_notes.fallback: If telephony is not configured, use emergency_escalation (SMS) instead and tell caller the team will call them back urgently.
